all.en: Business Trip Itinerary for Mr. Thomas Reynolds
all.zh: Thomas Reynolds 先生商務行程表

all.en: Trip Purpose: Asia-Pacific Regional Sales Conference and Client Visits
all.zh: 出差目的：亞太區業務會議及客戶拜訪

all.en: Travel Dates: November 4 to November 9
all.zh: 出差日期：11 月 4 日至 11 月 9 日

all.en: Monday, November 4: Depart New York (JFK) on Pacific Air Flight PA 217 at 11:45 P.M.
all.zh: 11 月 4 日星期一：搭乘 Pacific Air PA 217 班機於晚間 11:45 自紐約（JFK）出發。

all.en: Tuesday, November 5: Arrive in Singapore (Changi Airport, Terminal 3) at 7:20 A.M. local time.
all.zh: 11 月 5 日星期二：當地時間上午 7:20 抵達新加坡（樟宜機場第 3 航廈）。

all.en: A driver from Premier Car Service will be waiting in the arrivals hall holding a sign with your name.
all.zh: Premier 租車服務的司機將在入境大廳手持寫有您姓名的牌子等候。

all.en: Check in at the Marina Bay Grand Hotel, 88 Harbor Avenue, confirmation number MBG-44217.
all.zh: 入住 Marina Bay Grand 飯店，地址：Harbor 大道 88 號，訂房確認號碼 MBG-44217。

all.en: Tuesday afternoon: Welcome dinner with regional managers at Lotus Garden Restaurant, 6:30 P.M.
all.zh: 星期二下午：與區域經理於 Lotus Garden 餐廳共進歡迎晚宴，晚間 6:30。

all.en: Wednesday, November 6: Asia-Pacific Sales Conference, Marina Bay Grand Hotel Conference Center, 9:00 A.M. to 5:00 P.M.
all.zh: 11 月 6 日星期三：亞太區業務會議，Marina Bay Grand 飯店會議中心，上午 9:00 至下午 5:00。

all.en: Your keynote presentation is scheduled for 10:30 A.M. in the Orchid Ballroom.
all.zh: 您的主題演講安排於上午 10:30 在 Orchid 宴會廳舉行。

all.en: Thursday, November 7: Client meeting with Harmony Industries, 14 Cecil Street, 10:00 A.M.
all.zh: 11 月 7 日星期四：與 Harmony Industries 客戶會議，地址：Cecil 街 14 號，上午 10:00。

all.en: Lunch with Ms. Priya Sharma, Director of Procurement, at Riverside Bistro, 12:30 P.M.
all.zh: 與採購總監 Priya Sharma 女士於 Riverside Bistro 共進午餐，中午 12:30。

all.en: Afternoon site visit to the Harmony Industries manufacturing facility from 2:30 to 4:30 P.M.
all.zh: 下午 2:30 至 4:30 參訪 Harmony Industries 製造廠。

all.en: Friday, November 8: Depart Singapore on Pacific Air Flight PA 408 at 9:15 A.M., arriving in Tokyo (Narita) at 5:00 P.M.
all.zh: 11 月 8 日星期五：搭乘 Pacific Air PA 408 班機於上午 9:15 自新加坡出發，下午 5:00 抵達東京（成田機場）。

all.en: Check in at the Imperial Tower Hotel in Shinjuku, confirmation number ITH-90336.
all.zh: 入住新宿 Imperial Tower 飯店，訂房確認號碼 ITH-90336。

all.en: Saturday, November 9: Breakfast meeting with Mr. Kenji Watanabe of Sakura Trading at the hotel restaurant, 8:00 A.M.
all.zh: 11 月 9 日星期六：上午 8:00 於飯店餐廳與 Sakura Trading 的 Watanabe Kenji 先生共進早餐會議。

all.en: Depart Tokyo on Pacific Air Flight PA 109 at 6:30 P.M., arriving in New York at 5:45 P.M. the same day.
all.zh: 搭乘 Pacific Air PA 109 班機於下午 6:30 自東京出發，於同日下午 5:45 抵達紐約。

all.en: All flights are booked in business class and seat assignments have been confirmed.
all.zh: 所有航班皆訂於商務艙，且座位已確認。

all.en: For any changes or emergencies, please contact our travel coordinator, Linda Park, at 212-555-0192 or travel@globaltrade.com.
all.zh: 如有任何變更或緊急情況，請聯絡我們的旅遊協調員 Linda Park，電話 212-555-0192 或 travel@globaltrade.com。

all.en: Please carry a printed copy of this itinerary along with your passport and visa documentation at all times.
all.zh: 請隨身攜帶本行程表的紙本影本，連同您的護照及簽證文件。

all.en: A local SIM card with unlimited data will be provided upon your arrival at both Singapore and Tokyo.
all.zh: 您抵達新加坡及東京時，將提供無限數據的當地 SIM 卡。

all.en: Please remember that Singapore enforces strict customs regulations, so declare any electronic samples upon entry.
all.zh: 請記得新加坡實施嚴格的海關規定，因此入境時須申報任何電子樣品。

all.en: The hotel concierge in Tokyo can arrange professional translation services if needed during client discussions.
all.zh: 如客戶討論期間有需要，東京飯店禮賓部可協助安排專業翻譯服務。

all.en: Business attire is recommended for all client visits, while smart casual is acceptable at the conference reception.
all.zh: 所有客戶拜訪建議著商務正裝，會議招待會則可接受半正式服裝。

all.en: Receipts for taxis, meals, and incidentals should be saved and submitted through the expense portal upon return.
all.zh: 計程車、餐點及零星費用的收據應保存好，返回後透過費用申報系統提交。

all.en: The regional finance team has been notified to expedite reimbursement processing within five business days.
all.zh: 區域財務團隊已獲通知，將於五個工作日內加速處理報銷。

all.en: Two complimentary airport lounge passes have been added to your booking for use during transit stops.
all.zh: 您的訂位已加入兩張免費機場貴賓室通行證，可於轉機時使用。

all.en: Please review the presentation slides one final time before the conference and inform marketing of any updates.
all.zh: 請在會議前最後檢視一次簡報投影片，並告知行銷部任何更新內容。

all.en: Should you need to extend the trip for additional client meetings, contact corporate travel within 48 hours.
all.zh: 如需延長行程以進行額外客戶會議，請於 48 小時內聯絡公司差旅部門。

all.en: We wish you a productive and pleasant trip and look forward to your full report upon return.
all.zh: 祝您此行收穫豐碩且旅途愉快，並期待您返回後的完整報告。
